headline: FedEx (FDX) Pilots Ratify New 4-Year Labor Agreement with 83% Approval
summary: FedEx Corp. (NYSE:FDX) is one of the most undervalued quality stocks to invest in. On June 9, unionized pilots at FedEx Corporation ratified a new four-year labor agreement with 83% approval, formally ending more than five years of protracted negotiations. The contract takes effect on June 29 and covers compensation, retirement, scheduling, work rules, and […]
